subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the prison-ward, horizon of the Most Great Tribulation, from the Tree of Destiny: There is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما یوحی الیک من شطر السجن افق البلیه الکبری من شجر القضا انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @justice and wrath of God
